auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Encharge API key used with the X-Encharge-Token header. Get it from your Encharge account page: https://app.encharge.io/account/info.

actions.name: send_email
actions.description: Send a transactional email through the current Encharge account.

contentType.description: Which Encharge email content field to send.

content.description: Plain-text body, HTML body, or template name based on contentType.

userId.description: User ID of an existing Encharge person.

anyOf.description: Existing Encharge person reference used to resolve the recipient email.

to.description: Recipient email address string or an existing Encharge person reference.

name.description: Display name to use with the email address.

anyOf.description: An email address with an optional display name accepted by Encharge.

from.description: Email address string or object with email and name.

subject.description: Email subject. Required for text and HTML email content.

templateProperties.description: Dictionary of template values that Encharge replaces in the email subject or body.

unsubscribeCheck.description: Whether Encharge should skip sending to people who unsubscribed from emails.

UTMTags.description: Whether Encharge should apply account-level automatic UTM tagging to links.

cc.description: Comma-separated email address list accepted by Encharge.

bcc.description: Comma-separated email address list accepted by Encharge.

name.description: Display name to use with the email address.

anyOf.description: An email address with an optional display name accepted by Encharge.

reply.description: Email address string or object with email and name.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for sending an Encharge transactional email.

ok.description: Whether Encharge accepted the send request.

response.description: JSON response returned by Encharge, when present.

outputSchema.description: Normalized Encharge transactional email send result.
